gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into t_wf_ru_actinst (id,gmt_create, gmt_modified, procinst_id, actinst_name, actinst_key, start_time, end_time, actinst_type, flags, `status`, var_json) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.actinstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.actinstKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.startTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.actinstType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.varJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
